scenarios.description: String-overload: real HtmlTreeBuilder parses non-empty fragment with context and returns Element/TextNode list
scenarios.precondition: Parser created via Parser.htmlParser(), real TreeBuilder
scenarios.expectedResult: List contains one TextNode with text 'hello' inside a <span> context element
pseudocode: TEST TC19 real-htmlParser parseFragmentInput returns correct nodes

scenarios.description: Reader-overload: real HtmlTreeBuilder parses fragment reader without context into Comment/TextNode list
scenarios.precondition: Parser created via Parser.htmlParser(), real TreeBuilder
scenarios.expectedResult: List contains a Comment node with data 'cmt' and a TextNode 'end'
pseudocode: TEST TC20 real-htmlParser reader-overload parseFragmentInput returns mixed nodes

scenarios.description: Reader-overload: builder throws RuntimeException on first call then returns on second, verifying lock unlock in finally
scenarios.precondition: Custom TreeBuilder stub that throws on first parseFragment, then returns empty list
scenarios.expectedResult: First call throws IllegalStateException, second call returns empty list without deadlock
pseudocode: TEST TC21 lock unlocked after exception allows subsequent parse
